title: Add dedicated nvm_failed: label and SSN management logic with security comments in oscore_protect_request
description: After common wipe, add nvm_failed path that locks mutex to safely handle sender_seq (rollback or advance to prevent nonce reuse on reboot). Include detailed comment on why SSN must not be left incremented on NVM failure (AES-CCM nonce reuse attack vector). Reference RFC 8613 7.2 and oscore.c:1524.
close_reason: Added dedicated nvm_failed label, SSN rollback logic under mutex, and detailed security comment referencing RFC 8613 7.2 and nonce reuse prevention. Updated comment in oscore.c. Test paths verified. Commit fa942a4.
